name: Penla Table Lamp (Set of 2) - 20 Inch Height - TBL4226 - Black/Gold - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Penla Table Lamp, an embodiment of elegant simplicity. With its sleek black and gold finish, this lamp is designed to seamlessly blend into any decor, adding a touch of sophistication to your living room, bedroom, or office. Its refined base supports a perfectly shaped shade that casts a warm glow, creating an inviting ambiance for reading or relaxing. The Penla Table Lamp is meticulously crafted to prioritize both style and functionality, making it a versatile addition to your interior design. Whether you place it on a nightstand or a console table, its striking appearance and practical design make it a standout accessory. Transform ordinary moments into extraordinary ones with the Penla Table Lamp's effortless charm and timeless allure.
